description.en: The spotted hyena is a highly intelligent and highly successful African predator, famous for its bone-crushing bite and "laughing" vocalizations.
description.zh: 斑鬣狗是一种极其聪明且非常成功的非洲捕食者，以其能咬碎骨头的咬合力和类似「嘲笑」的叫声而闻名。

anatomy.en: Although they look like dogs, they are more closely related to cats and mongooses. They have sloping backs, powerful shoulders, and jaws strong enough to splinter the thickest bones of a buffalo.
anatomy.zh: 虽然它们看起来像狗，但其实它们与猫和獴的亲缘关系更近。它们背部倾斜，肩膀强壮，下颚力量大到足以咬碎水牛最粗的骨头。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Contrary to the myth that they are just scavengers, spotted hyenas are excellent hunters that kill most of their own food. They live in complex, female-led societies called clans, which can contain up to 80 individuals.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 与认为它们只是食腐动物的刻板印象相反，斑鬣狗是出色的猎手，它们绝大多数的食物都是自己捕杀的。它们生活在由雌性领导的复杂社会（家族）中，数量可多达80只。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are the most common large carnivore in Africa, distributed widely across sub-Saharan savannas, grasslands, and woodlands.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们是非洲最常见的大型食肉动物，广泛分布于撒哈拉以南的稀树草原、草地和林地中。
